title: RBI (Rural Cooperative Banks – Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
The RBI permits rural cooperative banks to retain or upgrade borrower accounts to Standard upon resolution plan implementation. The move ensures temporary NPAs due to calamities do not permanently impact asset classification.
The post RBI (Rural Cooperative Banks – Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
